{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Underlord dream tablets
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Underlord dream tablets]] provide information on what is required to open [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
